_provenance: 2026-07-19 session 019f6e76-5f8b-7633-8b19-d7cd457847fa; P-2026-044 and ADR 0013; owner portability correction
state_behavior: sanitized repository-scoped claims and handoffs in one user-private local ledger

concurrency_model.storage: portable file lock plus atomic JSONL replacement
concurrency_model.scope: one hashed Git common directory or canonical non-Git directory
concurrency_model.conflict_rule: different owners cannot hold overlapping live targets

lease_semantics.renewal: owner-only replacement that supersedes the prior claim

degraded_behavior.missing_git: canonical directory identity; no worktree unification claim
degraded_behavior.missing_external_service: local claims, handoffs, and Mission projection remain available
degraded_behavior.clock_forward_jump: lease may expire early; caller must reacquire and recheck work
degraded_behavior.clock_backward_jump: last ledger timestamp prevents a second owner

optional_dependencies: Git for common-directory identity across worktrees; ordinary directory identity remains available without it
unsupported_cases: remote Agent Mail or Fleet service connections
the full Textual Mission Control interface
automatic hooks, repository edits, provider-configuration edits, or credential discovery
hosted web consumers until local Python execution and state persistence are proven

state_writes: one sanitized event after an atomic owner/conflict check
